<?php namespace Illuminate\Foundation\Events; class VendorTagPublished { /** * The vendor tag that was published. * * @var string */ public $tag; /** * The publishable paths registered by the tag. * * @var array */ public $paths; /** * Create a new event instance. * * @param string $tag * @param array $paths */ public function __construct($tag, $paths) { $this->tag = $tag; $this->paths = $paths; } }
